Title: Senior Applied Scientist, Operations Research
Description:
About Wolt

At Wolt, we create technology that brings joy, simplicity and earnings to the neighborhoods of the world. In 2014 we started with delivery of restaurant food. Now we’re building the delivery of (almost) everything and you’ll find us in over 500 cities in 30 countries around the world. In 2022 we joined forces with DoorDash and together we keep on dreaming big and expanding across the globe.

Working at Wolt isn’t always easy, but it’s definitely exciting. Here you’ll learn more, build more, and ship more than in most other companies. You’ll be challenged a lot, but also have a lot of fun on the way. So, if you’re a self-starter with drive and entrepreneurial spirit, this could be the ride of your life.

Our Applied Scientists at Wolt build and deploy Applied Science and Machine Learning solutions to address a wide variety of challenging business problems. Utilizing a spectrum of methodologies including statistical analysis, machine learning, deep learning, and operations research, they improve critical processes within Wolt's online delivery platform and business operations. Their contributions significantly impact all 31 countries in which we operate.

The work consists of owning applied science use cases as part of a product development team; starting from identifying opportunities, to developing and prototyping a solution, all the way to supporting its deployment, monitoring, and improving it in production. We use a variety of technologies and tools including Python, SQL, Snowflake, Flyte, MLflow and Seldon Core to get the job done, and are constantly looking for ways to improve how our applied scientists work.

We are looking for an Applied Scientist specialized in Operations Research to be embedded into our cross-functional Logistics Assignments team. Together with other operations researchers, software engineers, and product, design and analytics people, you would develop algorithms and solutions for efficiently assigning tasks to our Courier Partners. Our task assignments engine is at the core of our logistics system. This is a unique opportunity to work on challenging operations research problems at a large scale. You will have great potential to make a significant impact by tackling complex problems and building new solutions to improve the efficiency of our logistics operations and, hence, our business.

📍This role can be based in one of our tech hubs in Helsinki, Berlin, or Stockholm.

Our humble expectations


Solid experience in Operations Research and production-level Applied Science projects, with the ability and interest to own solutions end-to-end: from prototyping to deployment, maintenance, and continuous improvement.
Deep understanding of Operations Research principles and a strong foundation in statistics.
Proven ability to work in highly complex domains, break down challenging problems into manageable parts, and develop innovative solutions. Comfortable explaining technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders.
Experience within logistics, optimization, or operational research domains is highly valued.
Knowledge of experimental design and analysis, including A/B testing.
Strong engineering skills with fluent coding ability in Python (our primary language for Applied Science projects) and experience working with databases (SQL). Experience with C++ or Go is a plus.
You value good software engineering practices, understand MLOps, and take pride in the quality of your code and the performance of your solutions.
Ideally, a degree in a field related to Operations Research or Applied Science.
Analytical, curious, business-oriented, and proactive mindset, with the ability to independently drive work forward while collaborating effectively with stakeholders across teams.


Next steps

The position will be filled as soon as we find the right person, so make sure to apply as soon as you realize you really, really want to join us!

The compensation will be a negotiable combination of monthly pay and DoorDash RSUs. The latter makes it exceptionally easy to be excited about our company growing and doing well, as you’ll own a piece of the pie.

Our Commitment to Diversity and Inclusion

We’re committed to growing and empowering a more inclusive community within our company, industry, and cities. That’s why we hire and cultivate diverse teams of people from all backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives. We believe that true innovation happens when everyone has room at the table and the tools, resources, and opportunity to excel.

Title: Machine Learning Engineer
Description:
Om rollen

Nu söker vi dig som har erfarenhet inom maskininlärning! Att vara anställd på B3 innebär att du hjälper våra kunder i deras utvecklingsprojekt och dagliga utmaningar. Vi ser gärna att du har vana att arbeta såväl självständigt som kundnära och är van vid ett agilt teambaserat arbetssätt.

Vi letar efter dig som har:


Minst 5 års dokumenterad arbetserfarenhet inom maskininlärning eller liknande område
Erfarenhet av att utveckla och implementera maskininlärningsmodeller
Gedigen erfarenhet inom minst ett programmeringsspråk (te.x. Python, Scala eller R)
Erfarenhet av SQL och databashantering
Erfarenhet av dataanalys- och visualiseringsverktyg så som Pandas, Matplotlib
Kunskap om maskininlärningsbibliotek som TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn
Behärskar god svenska och engelska i tal och skrift


Vad vi erbjuder:

Att vi trivs tillsammans på B3 är otroligt viktigt. Anledningen till att många börjar hos oss är bland annat det stora fokuset på kompetensutveckling, där vi kontinuerligt delar kunskap med varandra och uppmuntrar till kompetensutveckling och certifieringar. Vi erbjuder bland annat:


Generös kompetensutveckling
Attraktiv lönemodell
En fantastisk wellness- och medarbetarsatsning


Om B3

B3 är en börsnoterad koncern och trygg arbetsgivare med hög medarbetarnöjdhet. B3 har ca 1000 medarbetare inom många olika expertområden. B3 är rankad som Sveriges tredje bästa arbetsplats 2021 av Great Place to Work, utsett till Sveriges IT Karriärföretag 2022 och 2023, samt vann utmärkelsen Årets Karriärföretag 2022. Vi lever efter våra värdeord erfarenhet, olikheter och energi samt satsar på hållbarhet i alla led. Vi tror att medarbetare som mår bra presterar bättre och har därför B3 Team som anordnar aktiviteter inom wellness, från yoga och löpning till musikquiz och föreläsningar om stresshantering och mental hälsa.

Varmt välkommen med din ansökan redan idag!

Har du frågor om tjänsten? Tveka inte att kontakta rekryteringsansvarig, Lidia Hagos, för denna tjänst på lidia.hagos@b3.se.

Title: Backend Software Engineer
Description:
Are you interested in working on exciting challenges within high transaction environments? We are looking for you who are curious, can take initiative and come up with new creative solutions, and care about ultimately delivering a great product.  


The Role


Our Engagement Area in Product Development is growing and we are now looking for a Senior Backend Engineer to join! Engagement at Betsson Group ensures our customers come back for more. It’s all about loyalty. We provide a world class customer experience beyond the game play featuring Tournaments, Dynamic personalized campaigns and much more! 




You will be part of preparing our journey to containerization, increasing the scalability of our systems while also maintaining their high quality. To accommodate new requirements, we are constantly re-evaluating our systems design and working on exciting new features.


You have experience in



C#, .NET, .NET Core


SQL Server and NoSQL databases


Unit testing frameworks


Messaging within a micro service architecture


Agile development


Collaboration / knowledge-sharing



Extra awesome



Kafka


Experience in a modern front-end framework (e.g. Angular)


Docker containerization


Domain driven design



What’s in it for you?


We can offer you an environment full of ambition and passion. One day is never like the other as the only constant is change, to the better, to the greater. We strive to be the best in whatever field we choose to play on, and we make sure to have fun along the way!





A friendly, open and humble working environment, where you will have the chance to work alongside with colleagues from all over the world


A chance to evolve your skills together with your colleagues with various programs and initiatives


Personal development through courses, in-house training and external certification


Freedom with responsibility



Challenge Accepted?

HTML:
Are you interested in working on exciting challenges within high transaction environments? We are looking for you who are curious, can take initiative and come up with new creative solutions, and care about ultimately delivering a great product.  


The Role

Our Engagement Area in Product Development is growing and we are now looking for a Senior Backend Engineer to join! Engagement at Betsson Group ensures our customers come back for more. It’s all about loyalty. We provide a world class customer experience beyond the game play featuring Tournaments, Dynamic personalized campaigns and much more! 


You will be part of preparing our journey to containerization, increasing the scalability of our systems while also maintaining their high quality. To accommodate new requirements, we are constantly re-evaluating our systems design and working on exciting new features.


You have experience in

  • C#, .NET, .NET Core

  • SQL Server and NoSQL databases

  • Unit testing frameworks

  • Messaging within a micro service architecture

  • Agile development

  • Collaboration / knowledge-sharing


Extra awesome

  • Kafka

  • Experience in a modern front-end framework (e.g. Angular)

  • Docker containerization

  • Domain driven design


What’s in it for you?

We can offer you an environment full of ambition and passion. One day is never like the other as the only constant is change, to the better, to the greater. We strive to be the best in whatever field we choose to play on, and we make sure to have fun along the way!



  • A friendly, open and humble working environment, where you will have the chance to work alongside with colleagues from all over the world

  • A chance to evolve your skills together with your colleagues with various programs and initiatives

  • Personal development through courses, in-house training and external certification

  • Freedom with responsibility

Title: Data Scientist
Description:
Vill du arbeta med avancerad dataanalys och machine learning i en samhällsviktig verksamhet där teknik, automation och framtidens energisystem möts?







Vi söker nu en Data Scientist till ett långsiktigt konsultuppdrag inom utveckling av intelligenta beslutsstöd och prediktiva modeller för ett komplext och högteknologiskt driftområde.







Om uppdraget

Uppdraget är en del av ett större program kopplat till framtidens nordiska balanseringsmodell och utveckling av smartare, mer automatiserade stödsystem för drift och planering.

Fokus ligger på att utveckla:

Prognosmodeller
Prediktiva och ordinerande modeller
Beslutsstöd för drift och planering
Applikationer för flaskhalshantering och budfiltrering
Produktionssatta ML-lösningar med hög kvalitet och spårbarhet

Du kommer arbeta genom hela ML-livscykeln – från analys och modellutveckling till deployment, övervakning och vidareutveckling i produktionsmiljö.







Arbetsuppgifter

Du kommer bland annat att:

Designa och utveckla ML-modeller och prediktiva lösningar
Implementera pipelines och ramverk för produktion av modeller
Arbeta med kvalitetssäkring, loggning och reproducerbarhet
Utveckla applikationer för prognoser och beslutsstöd
Arbeta med drift, livscykelhantering och förbättring av ML-modeller
Samarbeta nära utvecklare, DevOps och verksamhet
Bidra med analyser och scenarier för operativ planering




Du kommer främst att arbeta med:

Python
Machine Learning
Docker
Kubernetes / OpenShift
Azure DevOps
Linux
CI/CD och automatiserade deployprocesser







Detta gäller ett konsultuppdrag med 6 månaders provanställning och därefter tillsvidareanställning. Du kommer bli anställd hos oss på A-Talent Tech Stockholm. Du har samma fördelar hos A-Talent Tech som hos andra arbetsgivare med kollektivavtal och förmåner som pension (med möjlighet till extra flexpension), friskvårdsbidrag och försäkringar.







Vi söker dig som har

Krav

Akademisk examen inom exempelvis matematik, statistik, fysik, datavetenskap eller teknisk fysik
Minst 2 års erfarenhet som Data Scientist
Mycket goda kunskaper i Python
Praktisk erfarenhet av Machine Learning i arbetslivet
Erfarenhet av CI/CD och automatiserade deployflöden
God Linuxvana
Mycket god svenska och engelska i tal och skrift




Meriterande

Erfarenhet av tidsserieanalys och prognosmodeller
Erfarenhet av ML i produktionsmiljö
Erfarenhet av Docker/Kubernetes i produktion
Erfarenhet av backtesting-miljöer för ML-algoritmer
Erfarenhet av grafdatabaser eller grafteori
Erfarenhet från kontrollrumsmiljöer eller samhällskritiska system




Personliga egenskaper

Vi tror att du är:

Driven och lösningsorienterad
Självständig och initiativtagande
Kommunikativ och pedagogisk
Samarbetsorienterad med lätt för att skapa förtroende
Strukturerad och kvalitetsmedveten

Du har också ett intresse för komplexa system och tycker om att omsätta data till praktiska och verksamhetskritiska beslut.







Övrigt

Placeringsort: Sundbyberg
Säkerhetsprövning krävs för uppdraget







Om A-Talent Tech

A-Talent Tech arbetar nischat med rekrytering och konsultuthyrning av teknisk kompetens. Våra rekryteringsspecialister har god teknisk förståelse och tillsammans med experter inom executive search hittar och rekryterar vi även de mest svårfunna kompetenserna till er organisation. Vi är en del av A-Talent Group, en koncern med specialistföretag inom kompetensförsörjning.




Låter det intressant?

Låter det intressant är du välkommen att söka tjänsten. Tillsättning kommer ske löpande så vänta inte med din ansökan! Vid eventuella frågor, kontakta ansvarig Filippa Eklund på filippa.eklund@atalent.se




Passa på och ansök idag!

Title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer
Description:
Build the practice, not just the model.

Imagine not just building advanced ML solutions, but seeing them drive real business impact across global brands like Polestar and Samsung. At Curamando, you won’t be coding in a silo. You’ll connect the dots between deep technical work and strategic business goals, ensuring what you build truly makes a difference. This is your chance to step into a role where you’ll mentor a talented team, collaborate with experts across diverse domains, and gain the organizational context that many ML roles lack.

We’re looking for a Senior ML Engineer who wants to help build that practice with us, not just deliver projects within it.

What this role actually is.

You’ll be our lead ML engineer, and you’ll be one of the people shaping what we offer, how we sell it, and how we develop the next layer of ML talent at Curamando. That’s not a footnote. It’s a big part of the job.

Our work is applied and embedded. We don’t ship models over a wall. We sit inside our clients teams and help drive the transformation with them. You will work alongside our change consultants who lead the transformation while you build the AI & ML that puts the strategy into motion.

What you’ll do.


Lead the engineering work. Design, build, and ship ML solutions for our clients, from first scoping conversations through production. Pick the right tool for the job, not the most exciting one.
Build the offering. You'll play a crucial part in shaping what Curamando's AI and ML offerings look like, methodology and points of view. The pace of change is relentless, so we need someone curious by nature, who reads, experiments, and tells signal from hype to keep the offering sharp.
Mentor the team. You’ll be the most senior ML voice in the room. Coach more junior engineers and analysts on solution architecture, code quality, and structured thinking. That work matters as much as the code you write.
Collaborate across Eidra. This isn’t a Curamando-only role. You’ll work closely with other parts of Eidra enabling their offering with AI and ML. We genuinely believe in cross-collaboration, and the relationships you build and the work you share across the collective are core to how we grow this practice.
Sit close to the business. Join sales conversations with our commercial team, and help translate client needs into real engagements. Push back when something doesn’t make sense.


Who we think will love this role.

You have a strong core in traditional ML, supervised learning, feature engineering, model evaluation and MLOps. You’ve also worked with LLMs, agents, and RAG enough to know where they shine and where they don’t.

Pragmatism is your default mode. You’ve shipped models in environments that weren’t perfect, with data that wasn’t clean, on timelines that weren’t generous, and you got something useful into production anyway.

Applied AI in growth, marketing, sales, commerce, and operations is genuinely interesting to you. The mission here is to make AI useful inside real organizations, not to always advance the state of the art AI.

What we’d expect you to bring.


Hands-on experience across the ML lifecycle in Python and the usual stack: PyTorch, scikit-learn, pandas, SQL, PySpark.
Working knowledge of at least one cloud platform: AWS, Azure, or GCP; Snowflake, Databricks, or similar.
Comfort with modern GenAI and agent patterns (RAG, tool-using agents), even if your core is traditional ML.
A track record of mentoring more junior engineers or data profesionals.
Enough business sense to hold your own in a client conversation.


Nice to have.


Experience in consulting, agency, or another client-facing setting.
A point of view on AI ethics, governance, or the EU AI Act in practice.
Some product or front-end instincts: enough to ship a working demo when the moment calls for it.
Familiarity with orchestration tools like Airflow or Dagster.


About Curamando.

We're part of Eidra, a collective of 1,400 specialists across 16 companies, from Stockholm to New York. We offer a steep growth trajectory, challenging projects, and a culture that values drive and results over prestige. We believe in the power of being together in person, which is why we've invested in brand-new offices in central Östermalm.

Curamando offers tailored consulting services with the best people and assets to help clients build competitive digital marketing and sales capabilities to reach their business goals.

We are a part of Eidra, a group of top-notch companies specializing in strategy, creativity, and engineering. As a collective we guide leaders in making meaningful and lasting change.

Title: Software Development Engineer - Sana
Description:
Your work days are brighter here.

We’re obsessed with making hard work pay off, for our people, our customers, and the world around us. As a Fortune 500 company and a leading AI platform for managing people, money, and agents, we’re shaping the future of work so teams can reach their potential and focus on what matters most. The minute you join, you’ll feel it. Not just in the products we build, but in how we show up for each other. Our culture is rooted in integrity, empathy, and shared enthusiasm. We’re in this together, tackling big challenges with bold ideas and genuine care. We look for curious minds and courageous collaborators who bring sun-drenched optimism and drive. Whether you're building smarter solutions, supporting customers, or creating a space where everyone belongs, you’ll do meaningful work with Workmates who’ve got your back. In return, we’ll give you the trust to take risks, the tools to grow, the skills to develop and the support of a company invested in you for the long haul. So, if you want to inspire a brighter work day for everyone, including yourself, you’ve found a match in Workday, and we hope to be a match for you too.

About The Team

About Sana

Sana is an AI lab building superintelligence for work. We believe organizations can accomplish their missions faster when teams can effortlessly access knowledge, automate repetitive work, and learn anything with the help of agentic AI. As part of Workday, we are committed to building AI that augments people - not replaces them.

We bring this mission to life through two products. Sana Agents provide a seamless way to access all your company’s apps, knowledge, and data, enabling AI agents to do real work so teams can process and act on information at unprecedented scale. Sana Learn is an AI-powered learning hub that combines the simplicity of a modern learning platform with intelligent features like an AI tutor, automated content generation, and interactive apps, making knowledge not just accessible but actionable.

We’re a talent-dense, product-obsessed team of engineers and designers from companies like Google, Spotify, Apple, and Databricks, united by deep technical excellence and rapid iteration. Our tools already help over a million people learn and work better across hundreds of leading enterprises - and we’re just getting started.

About The Role

About the role

Ship customer-facing value quickly in small teams - owning everything from problem definition through UX, API, and instrumentation. You’ll work end-to-end to deliver features that delight users and move the needle for Sana and our customers.

In this role, you will


Own features from design to deploy - frontend (React/TypeScript), backend (Node/TypeScript) and database (Postgres)
Integrate with agent and retrieval APIs to deliver seamless product experiences
Instrument products, run A/B tests, and iterate quickly with design and PM
Make pragmatic trade-offs and thrive in ambiguous 0→1 product spaces
Collaborate closely with stakeholders, users and teammates to define and solve the right problems


About You

What success looks like


Features ship fast, delight users, and drive measurable impact
End-to-end ownership is the norm - problems are solved, not handed off
Product instrumentation and A/B tests inform every iteration
You are a force multiplier for your squad, making everyone around you better
Ambiguity is an opportunity, not a blocker


Our tech stack

We build on a simple modern stack optimized for both humans and AI.


Backend: TypeScript, Kotlin, Node.js
Frontend: TypeScript, React, Tailwind
Databases: Postgres, Redis
Cloud infra: GCP/Kubernetes/Terraform


Our Approach to Flexible Work

With Flex Work, we’re combining the best of both worlds: in-person time and remote. Our approach enables our teams to deepen connections, maintain a strong community, and do their best work. We know that flexibility can take shape in many ways, so rather than a number of required days in-office each week, we simply spend at least half (50%) of our time each quarter in the office or in the field with our customers, prospects, and partners (depending on role). This means you'll have the freedom to create a flexible schedule that caters to your business, team, and personal needs, while being intentional to make the most of time spent together. Those in our remote "home office" roles also have the opportunity to come together in our offices for important moments that matter.

At Workday, we are committed to providing an accessible and inclusive hiring experience where all candidates can fully demonstrate their skills. If you require assistance or an accommodation at any point, please email accommodations@workday.com.

Are you being referred to one of our roles? If so, ask your connection at Workday about our Employee Referral process!

At Workday, we value our candidates’ privacy and data security. Workday will never ask candidates to apply to jobs through websites that are not Workday Careers.

Please be aware of sites that may ask for you to input your data in connection with a job posting that appears to be from Workday but is not.

In addition, Workday will never ask candidates to pay a recruiting fee, or pay for consulting or coaching services, in order to apply for a job at Workday.

Title: 【キャリア採用】MLOpsエンジニア
Description:
募集背景

MLOps、機械学習をテーマとしたエンジニアとして転職を考えている皆様へ

TDSEでは、AI・機械学習を活用したアプリケーションを開発し、お客様のビジネス価値を最大化することを目指しています。

昨今、MLOpsを導入しAI・機械学習のプロダクション化する案件も増えてきました。

このような背景の中、機械学習の自動化システムに向けて、私たちと一緒に業界を変革する意欲的なメンバーを探しています。

仕事内容

TDSEにおけるMLOps支援サービスを担当していただきます。

ワークライフバランスをうまく取りながら、仕事もプライベートも楽しんでいる社員が多いのが当社の特徴の一つです。

業務後は先端テクノロジーのキャッチアップやスキルアップ、趣味のために時間を費やす社員も多くいます。

社員同士でも主体的に勉強会を開催し、ポータルサイトで情報共有したり、各自スキルアップを行っています。

35歳以下を占める割合が高く、結婚・育児とライフイベントを迎えると男性社員も育児休暇を取得し、公私ともに充実した時間を持てる環境でもあります。また、有給取得率は7割程度です。

プロジェクトマネージャ

Title: Machine Learning Engineer
Description:
At Viaplay Group, we entertain millions of people every day through our streaming services, radio networks, and TV channels. We believe in the power of content not just as a way of telling stories and touching lives, but also expanding worlds.  

We’re looking for the best people to join us on our journey. Right now, we’re searching for a Machine Learning Engineer in our Stockholm office – are you ready to hit play on an exciting career change?

The Role 

As a Machine Learning Engineer at Viaplay, you will play a pivotal role in shaping the next generation of our data-driven products and services. Working at the intersection of personalization, customer engagement, and operational intelligence, you’ll design and deploy state-of-the-art ML systems that directly impact millions of users across our platform. 

Your responsibilities will extend far beyond model development. You’ll act as a strategic partner to product, engineering, and commercial teams, translating business objectives into scalable, high-impact ML solutions. Whether enhancing our recommendation engines, uncovering deep user insights, or enabling smarter decision-making across the organization, your work will be central to Viaplay’s continued growth and innovation. 

You’ll join a high-performing, inclusive, and curious team of ML Engineers, Data Scientists, Analysts, and Data Engineers. Together, we foster a culture of experimentation, shared ownership, and technical excellence. Our recommender system already powers engaging user experiences, and we’re only at the beginning of our machine learning journey. 

What You’ll Be Doing 


Design, develop, and deploy scalable machine learning models for recommendation, prediction, and classification use cases. 
Own and lead end-to-end ML initiatives, from ideation and stakeholder alignment to development, deployment, and ongoing performance evaluation.
Translate business needs into structured ML problems and deliver measurable, impactful outcomes. 
Build robust, production-ready pipelines and monitor ML systems in a cloud-native environment. 
Conduct advanced statistical analyses to uncover trends in user behavior, content performance, and platform engagement. 
Collaborate closely with product, engineering, content, commercial, and marketing teams to drive data-informed decision-making. 
Contribute to a culture of experimentation, innovation, and continuous learning within the data team. 


What We’re Looking For 

We're seeking someone who combines technical depth with strategic thinking and a curious, problem-solving mindset. 

We understand you may feel confident ticking certain boxes more than others and that’s why we always keep an open mind in our recruitment process. But, in order to thrive in this role, we do believe you’ll have at least some experience in the following: 


Proven experience leading ML projects end-to-end, from problem definition and stakeholder alignment to deployment and monitoring in production. 
Expertise in one or more ML domains such as LLMs, NLP, recommendation systems, or reinforcement learning. 
Ability to build ML solutions that are scalable, robust, and explainable, not just performant in isolation. 
Strong experience deploying ML models in cloud environments (preferably AWS) and using containerization tools like Docker .
Familiarity with orchestration tools such as Airflow for reliable ML pipeline execution and monitoring 
Solid software engineering fundamentals.
5+ years of hands-on experience in applied Machine Learning within production environments.
Strong academic background in Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science, or a related quantitative field.


It’s a bonus if you have: 


Experience with recommender systems, personalization, or content optimization — ideally in media, streaming, or e-commerce. 
Familiarity with MLOps practices, including CI/CD for ML, model monitoring, and production observability. 
Exposure to real-time or near-real-time ML architectures and streaming data systems.


What we offer you


We’ve got you covered! 30 days of paid vacation every year, an attractive pension and insurance scheme, and generous parental leave pay lift.
Your wellbeing matters. We provide you with various wellbeing initiatives including wellness allowance.
Flexibility that works. We follow a hybrid model with at least three days a week in the office, giving you the best mix of collaboration and focus time.
A safe space to grow and up-skill. Our learning culture puts you in the driver’s seat of your own development.
An innovative environment with Hack Days once a year. This week-long initiative allows you to think outside the box and deliver creative, technical solutions that (more often than not) go on to be implemented, either in our product or our ways of working.
Entertainment is what we love, and entertainment is what we do. So, unlimited access to Viaplay seems only fair for you to get to know the product – including serier & viewing events, new release movie rentals, linear channels and more. 


Hit play today 

If this feels like your kind of challenge, make sure you apply by attaching your CV here – you may also want to add your LinkedIn profile. Please don’t send us your application via email because we won’t be able to accept it. We do, however, welcome any questions you may have about this particular position. 

Want to learn more about who we are and what we do? Check out our careers page or follow us on Instagram! We’re only ever a few clicks away.

Title: Sr. Data Scientist
Description:
Job ID: 3228

Would you like use the power of data and analytics to personalise Private Banking customers banking experience?

We are looking for a curious and experienced Data Scientist, ready to take on a role with high impact across the Nordic Private Banking landscape. You will provide insights and recommendations, drive intelligent automation by applying model-based solutions, optimise processes and make sure we use the extensive data we have when interacting with our customers in different channels.

At Nordea, we see that the world is changing fast – and we want to be one step ahead of the curve. That’s why we’re deeply committed to providing the financial solutions of tomorrow to our customers. We’re creating an agile environment where we experiment and grow together – and we need your ideas and unique background. With us, you’ll be in good company with a chance to make your mark on something bigger.

About Our Team

You will be part of a Nordic team working closely across Finland, Sweden, Norway, and Denmark, enabling cross-market collaboration, alignment, and shared best practices. Together, we work across digital journeys, analytics, marketing technology, and customer engagement—continuously improving how we create value for our customers and the business.

In this role, you will serve as a crucial link between the business side of digital sales and engagement and the more technical aspects of data science, ensuring that analytical solutions are fully aligned with strategic objectives and operational needs. Your ability to translate business needs into actionable analytical solutions and communicate complex technical concepts in a clear and accessible manner will be crucial to your success.

You will help strengthen our analytical foundation and ensure data‑driven decision‑making across our use cases. You will collaborate closely with digital marketing and business stakeholders and agile delivery teams to turn data into measurable customer and business value.

This is an opportunity to influence Nordea’s digital transformation and drive tangible business outcomes through advanced analytics, experimentation, and production-ready machine learning, while facilitating seamless collaboration between business functions and technical experts. As part of the AWM COO organisation, you will join a strategic function focused on driving operational excellence, digital transformation, and scalable, insight-led ways of working across Asset & Wealth Management.

We are looking for someone with a strong analytical mindset who thrives in a dynamic environment and can translate complex data into clear business value.

What You’ll Be Doing


Develop data‑driven customer insights, segmentation frameworks, and behavioral propensity models that help orchestrate more relevant and personalized customer experiences.
Explore new datasets and proactively identify opportunities for improved performance across digital sales and engagement.
Work closely with cross‑functional teams to translate business needs into analytical solutions and ensure value‑driven prioritization across use cases.
Contribute to experimentation, A/B testing design, uplift modelling, and performance evaluation, leveraging robust statistical methods.
Partner with Marketing Automation specialists, data engineers, and digital marketing experts to ensure analytical models are deployed and monitored in production environments.
Share learnings, best practices, and new analytical approaches with colleagues across countries and business units.
Act as a key link between the technical aspects of data science and the business goals of digital sales and engagement, ensuring that analytical solutions are aligned with strategic objectives and operational needs.


You will become a trusted member of a data‑driven team focused on proactivity, engagement, and elevating the customer‑advisory relationship in the digital space.

The role can based in Stockholm, Sweden or Helsinki, Finland

Who You Are

Collaboration. Ownership. Passion. Courage. These are the values that guide us in being at our best – and that we imagine you share with us.

This is the right role for you if you:


Have a passion for data, analytics, customer behavior, and the possibilities they create — and you are motivated by solving complex business challenges through scientific thinking and innovative methods.
Are driven by achieving concrete results and seeing your work materialize in real customer engagement, satisfaction, and business impact. You enjoy both exploration and execution, and you thrive in environments where you can turn ideas into tangible, deployed solutions.
Have strong analytical skills combined with a business-oriented mind-set and an excellent communication skills.
Are a “Doer” that thrives in a complex environment, generating ideas, solving problems and communicating ideas and decisions effectively to team members and stakeholders


Your background and skills include:


4-5 years of experience in data analytics/data science
Proven experience working with advanced statistical modelling and machine learning techniques in a production‑oriented environment.
Strong analytical skills and hands‑on experience with Python or R, SQL, and modern data platforms.
Experience working with cloud‑based data and analytics environments (e.g. Azure, AWS, GCP).
Experience developing dashboards or insights using BI tools such as PowerBI, Adobe Analytics, or equivalent.
Experience designing Data Science experiments and working through the entire model lifecycle stages.
Experience working in a notebook environment during the experimentation stage and modularizing the code in python for production implementation.
Experience using any analytics platform like Databricks, Snowflake or Microsoft Fabric.
Experience using DevOps Tools (version control system, CI/CD pipelines).
Preferably experience working in Agile or SAFe environments.
Fluency in both written and spoken English (professional level). Swedish or Finnish beneficial and dependent on location.
A degree in data science, computer science, mathematics, statistics, engineering, economics, or equivalent quantitative field.

Title: Unreal Engine Developer (Gameplay)
Description:
Do you want to work at the intersection of Unreal Engine, AI, real-time animation and cutting-edge streaming technology? At Avanti Studios, you will be part of building next-generation live casino experiences that blur the line between reality and gameplay. By combining motion capture, advanced gameplay systems and photorealistic real-time rendering, the team is pushing the boundaries of what interactive entertainment can look and feel like.




About the role

As an Unreal Engine Developer at Avanti Studios, you will architect and implement core gameplay systems for a new generation of interactive live casino experiences. You will work in a highly technical environment where gameplay programming, multiplayer functionality, motion capture and real-time rendering come together to create photorealistic digital human experiences. You will collaborate closely with animators and technical disciplines in a team with strong focus on innovation, performance and R&D.




The role is based in Stockholm and the team primarily works from the office.




Key responsibilities

You will play a central role in developing Avanti’s platform and gameplay systems. Your responsibilities will include:

Design and implement gameplay systems for live casino games using Unreal Engine
Integrate WebRTC streaming technology with gameplay mechanics
Work with Metahuman characters and live capture data integration
Develop player interaction systems that combine responsive gameplay with real-time character behaviour that works seamlessly with live dealer streams
Create robust, scalable multiplayer game logic and networking solutions
Optimize performance for web-based streaming environments with real-time Metahuman rendering
Collaborate closely with animators and artists to integrate motion capture data into Metahuman characters
Implement UI/UX systems for player interaction and game controls
Contribute to gameplay architecture, technical tooling and long-term platform development




Your profile

We believe you have several years of hands-on experience working in Unreal Engine within gaming or other technically advanced real-time environments. You likely have experience developing gameplay systems, multiplayer functionality and/or interactive experiences where responsiveness and performance are critical.




To succeed in the role, we also see that you have:

Strong experience with Unreal Engine, preferably UE5.5 or UE5.6 as well as strong proficiency in C++
Experience with Blueprint visual scripting
Solid understanding of gameplay programming patterns and architecture
Knowledge of networking and multiplayer game development
Familiarity with WebRTC or streaming technologies (preferred)
Experience optimizing for performance and memory constraints
Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work in a fast-paced environment
Portfolio demonstrating gameplay development work
Fluent in English, written and spoken




Experience with Human Behaviour AI, real-time streaming or video integration, as well as familiarity with Metahuman and live capture systems, is considered meritorious. Experience optimizing Metahuman performance for streaming environments is also highly relevant for the role. In addition, experience from the gaming or gambling industry, including understanding of casino game mechanics and player behaviour, is seen as a strong advantage.




About Avanti Studios

Avanti Studios is an innovative technology company at the forefront of next-generation live casino solutions within the iGaming industry. By combining Unreal Engine, motion capture, AI-generated characters, 3D animation, and cloud-based real-time streaming, the company creates scalable and immersive gaming experiences for leading operators such as LeoVegas and Svenska Spel. Powered by Google Cloud, Avanti’s platform is built for continuous deployment and delivers highly realistic, fully customizable multiplayer experiences at scale. The company is in an exciting growth phase, offering an international and technically driven environment with strong startup energy, solid backing, and ambitious expansion plans for the future.




Your application

Avanti Studios is partnering with Academic Search International in this recruitment process. Please apply via the “Apply now” button below where you can submit your CV and application. All information is handled confidentially in accordance with Academic Search’s Privacy Policy and GDPR regulations.




For more information about the position, please contact Researcher Amelia Kämpeberg at amelia.kampeberg@academicsearch.se




We look forward to receiving your application as soon as possible as interviews are conducted continuously.




Academic Search International is one of Scandinavia’s leading Executive Search and Interim Management firms. We specialize in recruiting managers and specialists and collaborate closely with both national and international companies across a wide range of industries.

Title: Senior Data Scientist
Description:
Craft:

Job Description:

We have an exciting opportunity for an experienced Senior Data Scientist to join the central Candy Analytics team. In this role, you will drive strategic analytics projects, influence product direction, and support high-impact decision-making across the organization. You will operate at the intersection of data, product strategy, and player understanding, ensuring that insights are actionable, scalable, and aligned with business goals.

As a member of the team, you will investigate complex analytical problems, unearth strategic opportunities, and advocate for a holistic, insight-driven approach to product development. Your role will combine deep analytical expertise with strong business acumen, enabling you to guide both product teams and leadership in making informed, high-impact decisions. This role involves collaborations with multiple other research and product teams.

Your Role in Our Kingdom

If you're passionate about understanding player behavior, identifying growth opportunities, and shaping the future of Candy for 300 million+ players, this is the perfect role for you. You will work closely with cross-functional teams including other data scientists, product managers, designers, UX researchers, and corporate leadership to generate insights that directly influence product strategy and execution.

Your Responsibilities Will Include:


Driving Strategic Insights: Lead deep-dive analyses into player behavior, game performance, and feature impact to identify actionable opportunities that drive product and business growth.
Shaping Product Direction: Translate complex data into clear strategic recommendations, influencing roadmaps, feature prioritization, and long-term product vision.
Advancing Analytical Methodologies: Apply and evolve advanced analytical approaches, including causal inference, segmentation, and predictive modeling, to improve the quality and impact of insights.
Embedding Insights into Decision-Making: Partner with product and leadership teams to ensure insights are integrated into decision processes, from ideation to post-launch evaluation.
Identifying and Framing Opportunities: Proactively surface high-impact opportunities and frame them in a way that enables clear action and measurable outcomes.
Stakeholder Influence: Communicate insights effectively to a wide range of audiences, including senior leadership, translating complex analyses into compelling narratives that drive action.


Skills to Create Thrills

You are an analytically strong and business-savvy data scientist who can bridge the gap between data and strategy. You thrive in ambiguous environments and are motivated by turning complex problems into clear, impactful insights.

Must-Have Skills:


Advanced Analytical Expertise: Strong experience with exploratory analysis, segmentation, regression, and causal inference methods.
Strategic Thinking & Business Impact: Proven ability to translate data into actionable recommendations that influence product and business decisions.
Product Understanding: Experience working closely with product teams (ideally in the gaming or entertainment sector), understanding product development cycles, and contributing to roadmap decisions.
Programming & Data Manipulation: Strong proficiency in SQL and Python or R for data analysis and modeling.
Data Storytelling & Communication: Ability to communicate complex insights clearly to both technical and non-technical audiences, including senior stakeholders.
Cross-functional Collaboration: Experience working in cross-functional teams in fast-paced environments.


Bonus Skills


Causal Inference & Experimentation Knowledge: Familiarity with A/B testing and causal methods to complement insight generation.
Behavioral & Player Analytics: Experience analyzing user behavior, retention, engagement, and monetization in digital products or games.
Machine Learning Applications: Experience with predictive modeling, clustering, or recommendation systems.
Experience Working with UX Research: Experience with connecting user research findings with data telemetry.


Why Join Us?

At King, you will play a key role in shaping product strategy through data, working on one of the world’s most successful games. You’ll collaborate with world-class teams in a highly impactful and intellectually stimulating environment, where your insights directly influence decisions affecting millions of players.

Join us in making data-driven insights a key driver of product innovation and business success!

About King

With a mission of Making the World Playful, King is a leading interactive entertainment company with more than 20 years of history of delivering some of the world’s most iconic games in the mobile gaming industry, including the world-famous Candy Crush franchise, as well as other mobile game hits such as Farm Heroes Saga. King games are played by more than 200 million monthly active users. King, part of Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT), has Kingsters in Stockholm, Malmö, London, Barcelona, Berlin, Dublin, San Francisco, New York, Los Angeles and Malta. More information can be found at King.com or by following us on LinkedIn, @lifeatking on Instagram, or @king_games on X.

Title: Senior Data Scientist
Description:
Craft:

Data, Analytics & Strategy

Job Description:

We are looking for a Senior Data Scientist to work closely with product, game design and engineering on game difficulty, progression, and economy in Candy Crush Saga. In this role, you will help ensure that our 21,000+ levels and game features combine into a balanced, engaging, and evolving player experience.

You will operate close to the game, applying game analytics, experimentation, and modeling to inform decisions that directly influence gameplay and affect millions of players.

Role And Responsibilities


Analyze and evaluate game difficulty, progression, and player behavior across the level catalog
Design, monitor, and analyze A/B tests related to difficulty, features, and economy
Study how features, boosters, and economy mechanics interact with levels and player outcomes
Use data, models, and simulations to support decisions around difficulty tuning, pacing, and balance
Provide a strong analytical perspective in product and design discussions, helping shape priorities and trade-offs
Communicate insights, experiment results, and recommendations clearly to stakeholders with varying levels of data literacy
Ensure that the data needed to understand player interaction with levels and features is available, reliable, and well understood


Skills

Product and player understanding


Strong product sense with the ability to reason about player experience, engagement, and frustration
Ability to translate design intent and game experience into measurable hypotheses and analyses
Comfortable working iteratively with product managers, game designers and engineers.


Analytics and experimentation


Strong analytical coding skills in Python or R
Excellent SQL skills and experience working with large-scale player data
Solid understanding of A/B testing, experimental design, and statistical inference
Experience combining experimental results with observational analysis


Modeling and problem solving


Ability to systematically break down complex game systems into solvable analytical problems
Experience with simulation, optimization, or algorithmic approaches is a strong plus


Communication and collaboration


Strong communication skills, both written and verbal
Ability to influence decisions through clear storytelling, visualization, and data-driven reasoning
Experience working closely with cross-functional product teams




Experience with game difficulty balancing, progression systems, or virtual economies
Background in behavioral psychology, economics, or game theory
Experience in the games industry or other large-scale consumer products
Familiarity with large-scale experimentation platforms and live-operated products


About King

With a mission of Making the World Playful, King is a leading interactive entertainment company with more than 20 years of history of delivering some of the world’s most iconic games in the mobile gaming industry, including the world-famous Candy Crush franchise, as well as other mobile game hits such as Farm Heroes Saga. King games are played by more than 200 million monthly active users. King, part of Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT), has Kingsters in Stockholm, Malmö, London, Barcelona, Berlin, Dublin, San Francisco, New York, Los Angeles and Malta. More information can be found at King.com or by following us on LinkedIn, @lifeatking on Instagram, or @king_games on X.

Title: Data Scientist, Consumer
Description:
About Wolt

At Wolt, we create technology that brings joy, simplicity and earnings to the neighborhoods of the world. In 2014 we started with delivery of restaurant food. Now we’re building the delivery of (almost) everything and you’ll find us in over 500 cities in 30 countries around the world. In 2022 we joined forces with DoorDash and together we keep on dreaming big and expanding across the globe.

Working at Wolt isn’t always easy, but it’s definitely exciting. Here you’ll learn more, build more, and ship more than in most other companies. You’ll be challenged a lot, but also have a lot of fun on the way. So, if you’re a self-starter with drive and entrepreneurial spirit, this could be the ride of your life.

About Consumer Analytics At Wolt

The team partners closely with Wolt's product organization and business partners to make sure the right insights reach the right people at the right time, building a culture where data is a natural part of how we work, not a bottleneck or an afterthought.

The Core Experience team sits at the heart of this, covering the full customer journey from opening the app to completing an order – browsing, search, in-venue experience, cart and checkout. Data Scientists here work hand in hand with product teams, combining rigorous experimentation with sharp business judgment to move fast without sacrificing confidence.

About The Consumer Data Science Team

The team partners closely with Wolt's product organization and business partners to make sure the right insights reach the right people at the right time, building a culture where data is a natural part of how we work, not a bottleneck or an afterthought.

The Core Experience team sits at the heart of this, covering the full customer journey from opening the app to completing an order – browsing, search, in-venue experience, cart and checkout. Data Scientists here work hand in hand with product teams, combining rigorous experimentation with sharp business judgment to move fast without sacrificing confidence.

What you’ll be doing

As a Data Scientist at Wolt, your role involves diving into our data to solve crucial business problems. The scope of this role ranges from diagnosing problem areas to identifying solutions to designing experiments and ultimately influencing decision-making. This is a rare, operational and actionable data-driven experience that requires a good mix of technical and stakeholder engagement skills. When you join this team, you will be driving action from the frontlines, rather than just doing yet another analytics or data science role. Data Scientists at Wolt take ownership of the business outcomes.

If you enjoy finding patterns amidst the chaos, are excited to build from 0 to 1, and have experience using data science skills to solve business problems, we're looking for someone like you.

Our humble expectations


3+ years of experience in an analytics or data science position
Experience working with product funnels and user journeys
Proficiency in SQL and Python
Hands-on experience in designing and analysing A/B testing
Experience in using AI in your work to accelerate work velocity, automate repetitive tasks, and generate SQL queries and experiment readouts
Prior experience building intuitive data visualizations and dashboards that influence business decisions, utilizing tools like Tableau, Mixpanel, Looker, or similar


What we offer


The online delivery platform that Wolt is building will offer you interesting and complex challenges, together with the opportunities to create a big impact with your skills. Lots of geolocational and temporal data in real-time, combined with differences in the economics and dynamics of the cities we operate in, make Wolt both a challenging and interesting company to practice analytics!
You have the chance to decide the ways of working: hybrid, at the office, or remote within Stockholm or Helsinki. 💙
You would get to work in a company culture where we take ownership beyond the obvious, do common things uncommonly well, we think big but stay humble, do right by people, we treat others kindly and justly, recognize that if we don’t learn, we won’t stay still but fall behind and keep in mind that Luke was Yoda’s greatest achievement.


Next steps

The position will be filled as soon as we find the right person, so make sure to apply as soon as you realize you really, really want to join us!

For any further questions about the position, you can turn to Senior Talent Acquisition Partner - Zhanna Filintseva via zhanna.filintseva@wolt.com

Our Commitment to Diversity and Inclusion

We’re committed to growing and empowering a more inclusive community within our company, industry, and cities. That’s why we hire and cultivate diverse teams of people from all backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives. We believe that true innovation happens when everyone has room at the table and the tools, resources, and opportunity to excel.

Title: Data Scientist, Subscriptions
Description:
The Subscriptions Mission drives the growth and evolution of the Spotify business, ensuring we deliver compelling value to hundreds of millions of subscribers worldwide. We are focused on building the right set of offerings, plans, and value propositions that attract new subscribers and deepen engagement with existing ones.

You'll join the Portfolio Data Science team, part of Subscriptions Product Insights. The Portfolio Focus Area is responsible for evolving and adapting Spotify's existing subscription plans to drive subscriber growth and engagement, as well as creating new revenue streams through add-ons and new value propositions. This work requires coordination across the entire Subscriptions Mission and multiple focus areas, with ownership and oversight from the Portfolio leadership team.

As a Data Scientist on this team, you'll help the Portfolio team make informed decisions about how to grow and diversify Spotify's paid offerings. You'll analyze subscriber behavior, measure the impact of plan changes and new propositions, and surface insights that shape our strategy. Your work will directly influence how the Spotify experience evolves for users around the world.

What You'll Do


Analyze subscriber behavior and engagement patterns to identify opportunities for plan evolution and new value propositions
Design and analyze experiments to measure the impact of changes to subscription plans and add-on offerings
Define and maintain success metrics for Portfolio initiatives, ensuring alignment across cross-functional partners
Build and maintain dashboards and reporting to monitor the health and performance of subscription plans and new revenue streams
Perform exploratory analyses that uncover growth levers and inform the Portfolio roadmap
Collaborate with Product, Engineering, Design, User Research and other Data Science teams across the Subscriptions Mission
Communicate findings and recommendations clearly to both technical and non-technical audiences, including senior leadership
Use AI-powered tools (e.g., Claude Code, Codex) to accelerate analysis and workflows


Who You Are


You have 3+ years of experience in data science or analytics, ideally at a consumer tech or subscription-based company
You hold a degree in Statistics, Economics, Computer Science, Mathematics, or a related quantitative field (or equivalent experience)
You are proficient in SQL and Python and comfortable working with large-scale datasets
You have experience designing and analyzing A/B tests, with a solid understanding of statistical methods
You are a clear communicator who can translate complex analyses into actionable recommendations
You are curious, proactive, and comfortable navigating ambiguity in a fast-moving business
You enjoy collaborating across teams and are comfortable working in environments that require coordination across multiple stakeholders and workstreams


Where You'll Be


This role is based in London, Stockholm or New York.
We offer you the flexibility to work where you work best! There will be some in person meetings, but still allows for flexibility to work from home.


Spotify is an equal opportunity employer. You are welcome at Spotify for who you are, no matter where you come from, what you look like, or what’s playing in your headphones. Our platform is for everyone, and so is our workplace. The more voices we have represented and amplified in our business, the more we will all thrive, contribute, and be forward-thinking! So bring us your personal experience, your perspectives, and your background. It’s in our differences that we will find the power to keep revolutionizing the way the world listens.

At Spotify, we are passionate about inclusivity and making sure our entire recruitment process is accessible to everyone. We have ways to request reasonable accommodations during the interview process and help assist in what you need. If you need accommodations at any stage of the application or interview process, please let us know - we’re here to support you in any way we can.

We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us. Find our AI notice here: https://lifeatspotify.com/ai-notice

Today, we are the world’s most popular audio streaming subscription service.

Title: Fysioterapeut/Sjukgymnast till Rehab Bollmora i Tyresö.
Description:
Publicerad 19 maj 2026

📍

Stockholm, Tyresö

🗓

Sista dag att söka: 7 juni 2026

Tillsvidareanställning

Omfattning: 100%

Heltid

Vill du få mail när det kommer in nya jobb?

En av våra kollegor går vidare till nya utmaningar och vi söker därför en ny fysioterapeut/sjukgymnastkollega för arbete på mottagningen.

Vår mottagning ligger strax intill Tyresö centrum med goda kommunikationer. Hos oss arbetar 10 fysioterapeuter nära arbetsterapeuter, dietister, kiropraktor och rehabassistent. Vi finns i samma hus och har nära samarbete med Bollmora Vårdcentral och BVC där läkare, psykologer, sjuksköterskor och undersköterskor arbetar.

Att Vara Anställd Inom SLSO

Som anställd inom Stockholms läns sjukvårdsområde (SLSO) får du som medarbetare bland annat flexibel arbetstid, friskvårdsbidrag, friskvårdstimme, tjänstepension och försäkringar. Du kan läsa mer om våra förmåner här på: Förmåner hos Stockholms läns sjukvårdsområde

Arbetsuppgifter

Inom primärvården träffar du patienter i alla åldrar och från olika kulturer. Patienterna har en mängd olika typer av sjukdomar och problem. Som fysioterapeut/sjukgymnast inom primärvårdsrehab utför du självständigt undersökning, bedömning, behandling och rehabilitering av patienter individuellt och/eller i grupp/patientskolor. Samverkan med andra yrkeskategorier sker efter patientens behov. Hembesök kan förekomma individuellt eller i team med kollega av annan rehabproffession. Du deltar i regelbundna yrkesgruppsmöten och arbetsplatsträffar. Att handleda studenter ingår som en naturlig del i uppdraget.

Kvalifikationer


Legitimerad sjukgymnast/fysioterapeut
B-körkort
Erfarenhet av arbete i primärvård ses som meriterande, men vi är även intresserade av nyexaminerade
Vi ser gärna att du har erfarenhet av journalsystemet TakeCare


Personliga Egenskaper

Vi fäster stor vikt vid personliga egenskaper, vilket innebär att:


Du vill finnas med i den fortsatta utvecklingen av vår verksamhet och dela med dig av din kunskap
Du känner ansvar för både ditt eget arbete och verksamheten
Du har god förmåga att arbeta självständigt och att samarbeta inom och utom den egna yrkesgruppen
Du trivs med ett högt arbetstempo och har en god förmåga att prioritera


Anställningsform

Tillsvidaretjänst. Heltid 100%. Tillträde enligt överenskommelse. Provanställning kan komma att tillämpas.

Övrigt

Intervjuer kan komma att påbörjas innan ansökningstidens slut varför vi gärna ser att du skickar in din ansökan redan idag.

Välkommen med din ansökan!

Tjänsten tillsätts under förutsättning att den inte behöver tas i anspråk för intern omplacering, enligt gällande regelverk.

Tjänsten tillsätts under förutsättning att den inte behöver tas i anspråk för intern omplacering, enligt gällande regelverk.

Vid patientnära arbete inom Stockholms läns sjukvårdsområde:


tillämpas registerkontroll före beslut om anställning enligt SLSO:s övergripande anvisning för registerkontroll vid anställning.
ska medarbetare som kommer att ha patientkontakt genomgå nyanställningsundersökning, enligt gällande direktiv, vilket sker genom företagshälsovården innan anställning.
krävs, förutom svensk yrkeslegitimation, goda kunskaper i svenska språket motsvarande nivå C1 enligt den gemensamma europeiska referensramen (GERS). Samma krav är vägledande vad gäller icke-legitimerad personal med patientkontakt.


Stockholms läns sjukvårdsområde (SLSO) är en av Sveriges största vårdgivare med 11 600 medarbetare. Vi erbjuder hälso- och sjukvård i Region Stockholms regi inom psykiatri, primärvård, geriatrik, ASIH, närakuter, somatisk specialistvård, habilitering och hälsa samt hjälpmedel. I samverkan med Karolinska Institutet bedriver vi forskning, utbildning och utveckling. Läs mer om SLSO här.

Att söka jobb i Region Stockholm

Vi eftersträvar jämställdhet och jämlikhet på vår arbetsplats och ser gärna sökande med olika bakgrund och förutsättningar.

Vi tar endast emot ansökningar via detta system. Ansök genom att klicka på knappen ”Ansök”. Ansökningar per brev eller e-post beaktas inte. Vi undanber oss direktkontakt med bemannings- och rekryteringsföretag samt säljare av ytterligare jobbannonser.

Vårt rekryteringssystem kan inte hantera anonyma ansökningar eller sökande med skyddade personuppgifter. Om du har skyddade personuppgifter ber vi dig att kontakta den kontaktpersonen som finns angiven i annonsen. Din ansökan kommer då att hanteras utanför rekryteringssystemet. Du bör även vara försiktig med vilken information du lämnar i din ansökan och endast ta med information som är relevant för den aktuella befattningen.

Region Stockholm ansvarar för hälso- och sjukvård, kollektivtrafik, regional utveckling och bidrar till kulturlivet. Varje dag, dygnet runt. I landets snabbaste växande region. Tillsammans skapar vi Europas attraktivaste storstadsregion.

Läs mer om hur det är att jobba hos oss i Region Stockholm

Title: Artificial Intelligence Engineer
Description:
AI Engineer (mid-senior or senior) - Stockholm - hybrid/remote - permanent




We have a great opportunity for an AI Engineer (mid-senior or senior) with one of our long term clients. Looking for elite company?




Do you want to build and deploy real and secure AI products?




Do you want to contribute to concrete customer solutions, and at the same time help shape how AI will be used going forward?




Do you want to work with well-known brands in different industries, in projects where innovation, pace, and quality are at the center?




Work with a focus on GenAI, modern AI/ML platforms, deploy LLMs on hardware and robust infrastructure and much more. They not only deliver what is requested, but also help customers think bigger and go further.




You always wanted to combine your technical experience with a strategic perspective and be part of a team that drives development - not just follows it?




This is your opportunity to skip the hype and the marketing and work with leading experts in the AI field!




Location: Stockholm or any other Swedish office (with flexibility for remote work)




They are looking for someone with:




Strong software engineering foundation with professional Python exp.
Exp. building or integrating LLM-based systems in production
Exp. working with APIs, backend systems, and structured software development practices
Understanding of testing, evaluation, and reliability in AI systems
Fluent English
Ideally exp. with RAG pipelines and vector search, cloud infrastructure (Azure, AWS, or GCP), observability, CI/CD, and production monitoring and exp. working in regulated or security-sensitive environments




What's in it for you:




The opportunity to help shape the next generation of AI services
Competitive salary
Freedom to control your own time and workplace
Access to the latest technology – and a team that likes to geek out
A work culture that combines quality with curiosity and pace




Interviews are ongoing! Apply now with your up-to-date CV!

You always wanted to combine your technical experience with a strategic perspective and be part of a team that drives development - not just follows it?


This is your opportunity to skip the hype and the marketing and work with leading experts in the AI field!


Location: Stockholm or any other Swedish office (with flexibility for remote work)


They are looking for someone with:


  • Strong software engineering foundation with professional Python exp.
  • Exp. building or integrating LLM-based systems in production
  • Exp. working with APIs, backend systems, and structured software development practices
  • Understanding of testing, evaluation, and reliability in AI systems
  • Fluent English
  • Ideally exp. with RAG pipelines and vector search, cloud infrastructure (Azure, AWS, or GCP), observability, CI/CD, and production monitoring and exp. working in regulated or security-sensitive environments


What's in it for you:


  • The opportunity to help shape the next generation of AI services
  • Competitive salary
  • Freedom to control your own time and workplace
  • Access to the latest technology – and a team that likes to geek out
  • A work culture that combines quality with curiosity and pace


Interviews are ongoing! Apply now with your up-to-date CV!

Title: Data Scientist
Description:
Anyfin is building the next generation of consumer finance. We’re profitable, scaling quickly and now operating with a banking license which opens up a lot of technical complexity. With new products to launch and new markets to expand into, we’re entering our next phase of growth.

We’re looking for a Data Scientist who enjoys moving fast, taking real ownership and building things that actually have an impact. We work from the office because we think it makes us better, especially at this stage.

If that sounds like your kind of environment, keep reading. Because honestly, it’s not a role for everyone.

Small team, high responsibility

We hire carefully. We’re not a company that grows by adding headcount everywhere, we grow by keeping the bar high and building a team where every person matters.

This isn’t a place where you disappear into a big org. If you join, you’ll have real influence on what we build and how we build it.

What You’ll Do


Identify and own high-impact business opportunities, turning them into measurable, data-driven solutions
Design and build predictive models that drive real business decisions - credit underwriting, customer attribution, provisioning and more
Own experimentation end-to-end: from hypothesis and design to causal inference and impact evaluation
Deploy and maintain production-quality models with proper validation and monitoring
Partner closely with product, engineering and analytics to shape and deliver solutions
Design and implement data pipelines and models when the problem calls for it


How We Think About Building

We're pragmatic. We like speed, but we also care about building things that last.

AI isn't a side tool here. It's embedded in how we work. But AI is only as good as the foundation beneath it and part of this role is building that: bridging our data assets and analytical needs, and leveling up what data science can be capable of.

We're looking for data scientists who are curious about that shift and want to be part of it, rather than people who think good data science means doing everything the hard way.

No ego. Just good judgment and high output.

You’ll thrive here if you…


Take initiative and ownership whenever you see an opportunity
Are impact-driven and take a flexible, pragmatic approach to problem solving
Want to build intelligent systems that actually get used, not just prototypes or academic papers
Enjoy working in fast-paced cross-functional teams
Are excited by turning technical solutions into real business impact


Your Background Includes


Solid Python and SQL knowledge, with the ability to write production-ready code across the data science stack
Taking statistical and ML models from idea to production in real business environments
A solid grasp of experimentation design, A/B testing and causal inference
Navigating modern data warehouses and working across pipelines and data models
At least 2 years of professional experience, preferably from a start-up or scale-up


A few practical notes


Stockholm and office-based, because we believe that great products and culture are better built when you meet in person
EU work authorization required


Why Anyfin?

Because this is one of those moments where a company is about to level up: Banking license secured, expansion ahead and a lot to build.

If you want to be part of a small, high-trust team doing meaningful work, we’d love to hear from you. Apply only if you want the responsibility that comes with real impact.

Anyfin is a fintech on a mission to simplify loan repayments and improve the financial well-being of millions. We help consumers reduce the costs of high-interest loans, and take control of their repayment plan.

Title: STEM Expert - Fully Remote
Description:
About The Job

Mercor connects elite creative and technical talent with leading AI research labs. Headquartered in San Francisco, our investors include Benchmark, General Catalyst, Peter Thiel, Adam D'Angelo, Larry Summers, and Jack Dorsey.

Position: STEM PhDs

Type: Contract

Compensation: $60–$80/hour

Location: Remote

Commitment: 15–20 hours/week

Role Responsibilities


Develop challenging problems in your domain to enhance AI model training.
Evaluate and improve AI model outputs through rigorous data analysis.
Collaborate with AI research teams to refine training data quality.
Work independently and asynchronously to meet project deadlines.
Shape the future of AI innovation with your domain expertise.



Qualifications

Must-Have


STEM PhD from a US, UK, Canadian, or European university.
High attention to detail.
Exceptional written and verbal communication skills.
Excellent proficiency in English.



Start Date


April; applications reviewed on a rolling basis.



Interview Process


Complete a short interview that will take 20–30 mins in total.



Application Process (Takes 20–30 mins to complete)


Upload resume
AI interview based on your resume
Submit form



Resources & Support


For details about the interview process and platform information, please check: https://talent.docs.mercor.com/welcome
For any help or support, reach out to: support@mercor.com



PS: Our team reviews applications daily. Please complete your AI interview and application steps to be considered for this opportunity.

Title: Data Scientist
Description:
TL;DR - We are looking for a data scientist to build Lovable's data and analytics muscle. You'll work cross-functionally across all teams to level up our understanding of users, uncover opportunities and empower everyone with the insights they need for data-driven decision making. Must combine analytical rigor with the ability to turn complex data into winning product bets.

Why Lovable?

Lovable lets anyone and everyone build software with any language. From solopreneurs to Fortune 100 teams, millions of people use Lovable to transform raw ideas into real products - fast. We are at the forefront of a foundational shift in software creation, which means you have an unprecedented opportunity to change the way the digital world works. Lovable-built applications and websites are visited hundreds of millions of times a month, and our enterprise footprint is compounding fast. And we’re just getting started.

We’re a small, talent-dense team building a generation-defining company from Stockholm. We value extreme ownership, high velocity, and low-ego collaboration. We seek out people who care deeply, ship fast, and are eager to make a dent in the world.

What We’re Looking For


A business-minded data scientist who's excited to level up our analytics efforts: metrics frameworks, behavioral models, and hypothesis testing
Solid technical foundation (SQL, Python, statistical analysis) - comfortable working with data at scale and translating it into insights
Deep curiosity about user behavior and what actually drives growth and retention
Ability to move between exploratory analysis, building behavioral models, hypothesis testing, and strategic recommendations


What You’ll Do


Work closely with growth, product, and marketing to identify key levers in the customer journey
Analyze funnels, cohorts, and user behaviors to surface insights that drive decisions
Build dashboards, alerts, and automated reporting to keep the team informed and aligned
Design and analyze experiments (A/B tests, growth tests) to understand, impact and inform strategy
Monitor data quality and collaborate with engineering to maintain reliability
Leverage AI tools and automation to scale your analysis and focus on high-impact questions
Translate data into clear, actionable narratives that drive product and business decisions


Our tech stack

We're building with tools that both humans and AI love:


Frontend: React
Backend: Golang and Rust
Cloud: Cloudflare, GCP, AWS, Many LLM providers
DevOps & Tooling: Github Actions, Grafana, OTEL, , infra-as-code (Terraform)


And always on the lookout for what's next!

How We Hire


Fill in a short form then jump on an initial exploratory call.
Discuss your experience in more depth during a round of interviews with us.
Join us for a workshop lasting 1-2 days remote or onsite. We'll see how you tick and you get to meet the team and explore whether joining Lovable feels right for you.


About Your Application


Please submit your application in English. It’s our company language so you’ll be speaking lots of it if you join.
We treat all candidates equally - if you’re interested please apply through our careers portal.
